S

searchRecords(String, String) - 类中的方法 controller.Impl.AccountBookControllerImpl
Searches financial records by date range.
setAge(int) - 类中的方法 model.UserModel
Sets the user's age.
setAmount(double) - 类中的方法 model.Entry
 
setCategory(String) - 类中的方法 model.Entry
 
setDate(String) - 类中的方法 model.Entry
 
setDescription(String) - 类中的方法 model.Entry
 
setFinanceFileDirectory(String) - 类中的静态方法 controller.Impl.SettingControllerImpl
Sets the finance data directory and migrates existing files.
setGender(boolean) - 类中的方法 model.UserModel
Sets the user's gender.
setPassword(String) - 类中的方法 model.UserModel
Sets the user's password.
SettingController - controller中的接口
 
SettingControllerImpl - controller.Impl中的类
Settings controller for managing application configurations and user finance data paths.
SettingControllerImpl(UserControllerImpl) - 类的构造器 controller.Impl.SettingControllerImpl
Initializes the settings controller with user context.
SettingUi - view中的接口
 
SettingUiImpl - view.Impl中的类
UI implementation for application settings, including financial data directory management and user profile editing.
SettingUiImpl(JPanel, UserControllerImpl) - 类的构造器 view.Impl.SettingUiImpl
Initializes the settings UI with user controller and configuration logic.
SettingWindow() - 类中的方法 view.Impl.SettingUiImpl
Displays the settings window with directory selection and user profile fields.
setUsername(String) - 类中的方法 model.UserModel
Sets the user's unique username.
showException - controller.Impl中的异常错误类
 
showException(String) - 异常错误类的构造器 controller.Impl.showException
 
showException(String, Throwable) - 异常错误类的构造器 controller.Impl.showException
 
start() - 记录类中的方法 controller.Impl.AccountBookControllerImpl.ProcessedDates
返回 start 记录组件的值。
